markdown:
#  Edit a Commitment's Schedule of Values (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To edit a purchase order or subcontract:_
      * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can be performed in offline mode if the asset/item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode will sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
Edit a Commitment 
##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the commitment you want to edit the schedule of values for.
  3. Tap **Schedule of Values**.  
![Commitments Android View Commitment Schedule Of Values](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3c097da58a062823ae0c029015ae323f/9fcef8fde478896ebb5f2fa46404171f/commitments-android-view-commitment-schedule-of-values.png?fm=webp)
  4. Tap the item you want to edit.
  5. Tap **Edit**
  6. Tap into a field to modify the appropriate information.
  7. Tap **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
  * [Commitments (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/permissions)
  * [View a Commitment's Schedule of Values (SOV) (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/view-a-commitments-schedule-of-values-sov-android)
title: Edit a Commitment's Schedule of Values (Android)
description: How to edit the schedule of values of a commitment using the Procore app an Android mobile device.
